title: Animated History Map — QA Report (machine-written)
description: Emitted ONLY by lib/midnight_magnates/runner.py. Records real gate exit codes + input hashes. An agent must never hand-author this file; the render-lock validates it against this schema and rejects reports whose input_hashes are stale.

stage.description: Stage name, or 'ALL' when the whole pipeline's gates were run.

runner_signature.description: e.g. 'midnight_magnates.runner@<version>' — proves a process, not an agent, wrote this.

input_hashes.description: sha256 of every artifact the gates read, at run time. The render-lock recomputes these and rejects the report if any differ (a stale green from old inputs fails).

all_passed.description: True iff every BLOCKING gate has passed == true.
